ai.notes: The form uses Lever's standard application structure. Demographic survey fields were truncated in the provided HTML excerpt.

fields.question: Do you currently work at Once Upon a Farm?
Were you referred by someone who works at Once Upon a Farm? If so, who?
Due to current team needs, we are only considering candidates based in the USA. Please confirm you're based in the USA.
options: Yes, I am based in the USA.
No, I am not based in the USA, but I'm planning to relocate to the USA.
No, I am not based in the USA, nor am I open to relocating to the USA.

fields.question: Will you now or in the future require sponsorship to work for a U.S. employer (e.g., H-1B, TN, E-3, F-1 visa status)?
How did you hear about this role?

We believe it’s on us to provide an inclusive interview experience for all, including people with disabilities. We are happy to provide reasonable accommodations to candidates in need of individualized support during the hiring process. Please specify any requests for such accommodations here.
Do you have a portfolio site?
Which of the following have you personally done for a TikTok account? (Select all that apply)
options: Edited video myself (CapCut, Adobe Premier/Rush, or equivalent)
Published and managed the posting calendar

fields.question: Have you created content directly for or alongside a founder, executive, or public-facing talent?
options: Yes — I've regularly produced content with/for a founder or public figure
Yes — occasionally or on a one-off basis
No, but I've worked closely with brand spokespeople or influencers

fields.question: Which of the following have you done with TikTok Shop? (Select all that apply)
options: Set up or managed a TikTok shop
Created shoppable content or product integrations
Ran or produced TikTok Live shopping formats
I have not worked with TikTok Shop

fields.question: This role is based in Los Angeles and requires regular in-person content capture with founders and at events. We are also open to candidates based in NYC or the Greater Bay Area. What is your current situation?
options: I currently live in the LA metro area
I currently live in the Bay Area, CA
I do not live in one of these metro locations
